name: Session_Williams_R_Volatility_Squeeze
description: A high-quality 15-minute swing intraday strategy utilizing Williams' %R momentum shifts paired with an asymmetric volatility breakout. It locates key value distribution using a medium-term Triangular Moving Average (TRIMA) baseline. Momentum surges are detected when the fast Williams' %R crosses outside its classic trading bands. To protect against fakeouts during compressed horizontal phases and to circumvent division traps on zero-volume bars, entries require a structural volatility expansion condition where the short standard deviation breaks past an adjusted ATR threshold channel. Out-of-loop vectorized exits track price deviations away from rolling structural midpoints.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < Midpoint_Exit) or (WILLR < -50.0). Exit Short: (close > Midpoint_Exit) or (WILLR > -50.0).
